_comment: Editable pricing config. USD per million tokens (MTok), base input/output rate per model. Cache multipliers apply on top of the base input rate and are stable across Claude models per Anthropic's prompt-caching docs. Snapshot below is dated; check https://www.anthropic.com/pricing and edit the numbers, no code changes needed. This file is read fresh on every run, so a price change never requires a new release.
